title: Maximumnumber of email that can be sent out in a day
excerpt: I would like to check if I am linking my Outlook account to Monday CRM, is there any limitation towards the number of email that I can send in a day before the email address is being flagged as spam?

posts.author: Haikal_EDMS (Abqari Haikal)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to check if I am linking my Outlook account to Monday CRM, is there any limitation towards the number of email that I can send in a day before the email address is being flagged as spam?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There’s not a magic number, it’s more a question for microsoft than monday. What I tell my team is to not send more than about 50 a day to start (then increase over time).

posts.author: Haikal_EDMS (Abqari Haikal)
posts.cookedHtml: I see. Meaning that there is no specific number that we can rely as “safe” and for now it is more on test as you go as this is dpeending on the email provider right?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it’s dependent on the email provider…

posts.author: Haikal_EDMS (Abqari Haikal)
posts.cookedHtml: ALright Desiree. Thank you so much in making this clear. I guess I have to think of a way how I can get this done without being blocked by Microsoft.
